name: golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev
title: golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev
summary: reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs
description:
reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs
Gcfg reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs; supports
user-defined types and subsections.
.
This package provides go-gcfg/gcfg fork for usage in src-d/go-git.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev because reads INI-style configuration files into Go structs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-src-d-gcfg-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
